description: Resolve the effective quantitative limits for a specific workspace. For each dimension: returns the workspace sub-quota if set, otherwise indicates the workspace uses the tenant shared pool. Flags inconsistencies where sub-quota exceeds the current tenant effective limit. Boolean capabilities are not workspace-scoped and are not included here; use tenant-effective-entitlements-get for capabilities.

workspaceLimit.description: null = workspace uses shared tenant pool

isInconsistent.description: true when workspaceLimit > tenantEffectiveValue and tenantEffectiveValue != -1

inconsistentDimensions.description: List of dimensionKey values where isInconsistent = true. Empty array means no inconsistencies.

errors.description: Actor cannot read limits for that tenant/workspace
